title: kopsia longiflora
intro: Kopsia longiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the long-flowered kopsia or kopsia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Kopsia longiflora include its potential to treat hypertension, fever, and respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Kopsia longiflora are typically made from its leaves and roots, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
